name: codex-threaddeck
description: Codex ThreadDeck control-plane preview for normal project routing, controller/worker coordination, default trigger diagnostics, and bounded subagent policy inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Route normal Codex project work through CTD when installed
interface.longDescription: Codex ThreadDeck helps Codex conversations treat ordinary project prompts as CTD-routable intent, detect project state, recommend the smallest execution surface, optionally record advisory auto-route hook decisions, prepare safe dispatch plans, render task cards, parse short reports, validate registries, update status boards, and create handoffs while respecting Codex tool boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this project should use CTD
Check the CTD execution route for this task
Plan CTD dispatch for the latest routing decision
